reasoning: Query asks about cherry blossoms in Tohoku (not Tokyo). Tool returned only Akita prefecture spots, missing wider Tohoku coverage. Kakunodate samurai district (sakura_meisho_100) is highly relevant but buried below lake/mountain entries lacking sakura tags. Other Tohoku prefectures (Aomori Hirosaki, Fukushima Miharu, etc.) not surfaced. Data accurate but ranking buries sakura-relevant items.
missing_data: Other Tohoku prefectures (Aomori, Iwate, Yamagata, Fukushima, Miyagi) cherry-blossom spots; explicit sakura filter
improvement_hint: For multi-prefecture region queries, the agent should call get_spots per Tohoku prefecture or the server should expose a region parameter. Boost sakura_meisho_100 kinds when query terms include 桜/cherry.

reasoning: Returns 24 items for Niigata sake, including major brands like Koshi no Kanbai, Hakkaisan, Kubota with brewery info and historical context. Mixes sake brands and breweries appropriately. Some non-sake GI items (chamame edamame) included, but sake brands are well-represented and accurate.
missing_data: Address/visit info for breweries (could be helpful for visits)
improvement_hint: Optionally distinguish sake_brand vs sake_brewery and include website/visit-feasible flag for breweries that accept tours.

reasoning: Query asks for ski + onsen in Hakuba. Returns Hakuba Happo-One and various Hakuba spots, but does not surface onsen co-located with ski resorts. No combined ski_resort+onsen filter applied. Some entries (Hakuba Saegusa Art Museum, art garden) are not relevant to constraint.
missing_data: Onsen near or within ski resorts (Happo Onsen, Hakuba Yari Onsen, etc.)
improvement_hint: Implement compound-constraint handling — the agent should call get_spots with ski_resort kind plus an onsen-adjacency check, or expose a combined query.

reasoning: Query asks for Kansai autumn-foliage spots. Tool returned only Kyoto spots (subset of Kansai) with castles/temples that happen to be famous for autumn foliage but no momiji-specific filter. Other Kansai prefectures (Osaka, Hyogo, Shiga, Wakayama, Nara) not included. Tofuku-ji, Eikan-do not visibly hoisted.
missing_data: Explicit autumn-foliage (koyo) signals; multi-prefecture Kansai coverage; named koyo-meisho temples
improvement_hint: Add a koyo_meisho_100 kind list or seasonal tag, and surface region-level queries to call multiple prefectures.

reasoning: Query is in Arabic asking for cherry blossom spots in Kansai. Tool returned Nara spots; Mount Yoshino (top sakura site in Japan, sakura_meisho_100 tag) is correctly surfaced first. Other Nara items (Kofuku-ji, Nara Park) are sakura-relevant. Single-prefecture coverage limits Kansai breadth but Yoshino is the canonical answer.
missing_data: Other Kansai sakura sites (Yoshino is in Nara but Maruyama Park, Philosopher's Path, Himeji are not included)
improvement_hint: For region-level queries, server could fan out across Kansai prefectures or expose a region parameter.

reasoning: Query asks about stargazing on Okinawa's outer islands. Tool returned mainland Naha cultural sites (castles, monuments) which do not match. Taketomi Island appears (relevant) but no stargazing/dark-sky tag is surfaced. Iriomote, Ishigaki, Hateruma (the actual dark-sky destinations) not visible in this 4000-char window.
missing_data: Outer-island stargazing locations (Hateruma, Iriomote, Ishigaki dark-sky parks); dark_sky kind tag
improvement_hint: Add a dark_sky / stargazing kind tag (Hateruma, Iriomote, Kozushima) and boost outer-island spots when query mentions 離島/星空.

reasoning: Query in Thai asks for rural Hokkaido onsen accommodations. Tool returns hito_yu_kai onsen ryokan (Nihon Hito-yu wo Mamoru Kai — secluded onsen association) — perfect match. Addresses provided. Some urban Sapporo hotels mixed in lower-ranked.
missing_data: Coordinates for some hito_yu_kai entries; website URLs
improvement_hint: Filter or rank to put onsen_ryokan/hito_yu_kai first when query mentions onsen+rural; geocode hito_yu_kai entries.

reasoning: Query (Vietnamese) asks for islands in Seto Inland Sea. Tool returned Kagawa spots but top items are Ritsurin Garden, Mannō Lake, Marugame Castle, Takamatsu Castle — none are islands. Naoshima/Teshima/Shodoshima (the famous Seto art islands) are not surfaced in the visible window.
missing_data: Naoshima, Teshima, Shodoshima, Inujima, Megijima, Ogijima as island entries with art_island/setouchi_triennale tags
improvement_hint: Boost island kinds and Setouchi-related tags when query mentions 瀬戸内/島. Multi-prefecture (Okayama, Hiroshima, Ehime) coverage needed for Seto islands.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Tool returned 3 craft items including Awa Hon-ai Shijira Weave (relevant) and Awa Washi (mentions indigo dyeing). However, no actual workshop venues for tourists to visit are surfaced. Otani Ware (pottery) and Otsuka Museum (modern art) are off-topic.
missing_data: Tokushima Aizumi Historical Museum, Furusho Aizome workshop, indigo experience venues; visit-bookable workshops
improvement_hint: Add a workshop/experience kind, and link Awa Indigo to specific tourable studios via municipal scrape data.

reasoning: Query (German) asks for Buddhist temple shukubo on Mt. Koya. Tool returned koyasan_shukubo entries (official Koyasan Shukubo Association) with phone, descriptions, and source URLs. Excellent direct hit — exactly what the user wanted.
missing_data: Coordinates and English names for individual shukubo
improvement_hint: Add geocoded coordinates and English-translated descriptions for koyasan_shukubo entries.

reasoning: Query asks for samurai districts outside Kyoto. Tool returned 146 buke_yashiki matches across Shimane, Fukui, Akita (Kakunodate), Kagoshima (Chiran), Fukushima (Aizu) — exactly the off-the-beaten-path districts the user wants. Heritage designations included.
missing_data: Filtering to exclude Kyoto explicitly; ranking by prominence
improvement_hint: Sort buke_yashiki/preservation_district results by prominence_score and surface UNESCO/Important Preservation district first.

reasoning: Query (Indonesian) asks for summer festivals in Akita. Tool returned only 3 bunka_intangible entries and none are explicitly summer or famous Akita summer festivals like Kanto Matsuri. reasoning: Query (Korean) asks for small port towns in Sanin. Tool returned Lake Shinji, Matsue Castle, Iwami Ginzan, Mt. Sanbe — none are port towns. No fishing-port (gyokō) tag surfaced. Mihonoseki, Hamada, etc. not visible.
missing_data: Mihonoseki, Hamada, Karoichi, Sakaiminato (Tottori) port-town entries; fishing_port/port_town tags
improvement_hint: Add port_town/fishing_port kind, and for 山陰 queries also include Tottori prefecture.

reasoning: Query asks where to experience washi-making in Gifu. Listed crafts are accurate but don't directly serve the workshop intent.
missing_data: Mino washi (UNESCO), Mino Washi-no-Sato Kaikan, papermaking experience venues

reasoning: Query (Spanish) asks for fishing villages in Noto Peninsula. Tool returned Kanazawa Castle, Kenroku-en, Bed and Craft (Inami), Nanao Castle — Nanao is on Noto but the others are Kanazawa city, not fishing villages. Wajima/Suzu/Sosogi/Shiroyone Senmaida not visible.

reasoning: Query asks for sand dunes other than Tottori. Tool returned 90 matches via sand_dune kind class, including Onjuku Beach (Chiba), Ishikari (Hokkaido), Fukiagehama (Kagoshima), Tsujido (Kanagawa). Tottori still ranked first but lesser-known dunes are surfaced.
missing_data: Nakatajima Sand Dunes (Shizuoka), Sarugamori Dunes (Aomori) — verify presence

reasoning: Query in Chinese asks for traditional crafts in Sanin. Tool returned Shimane crafts (Iwami-yaki, Sekishu washi, Unshu abacus, Izumo stone lanterns) with Chinese translations — exactly the right designated traditional crafts.

reasoning: Query (Tagalog) asks for traditional coffee towns in Kyushu. The query is unusual — Japan has no famous 'coffee towns'. Topic intent says '九州 古い町並み' (old townscapes). reasoning: Query asks for kominka stays in Hokuriku. Tool returned hito_yu_kai onsen ryokan and OSM hostels/AB Hotel — none are kominka. Bed and Craft (Inami) and similar kominka networks not surfaced. type=kominka_stay filter not applied.

reasoning: Query asks for mountain shrines in Kii Peninsula. Tool returned Wakayama heritage including Kongōbu-ji (Mt. Koya), Negoro-ji, Kumano Kodo, Kumano Sanzan — exactly the canonical mountain pilgrimage sites. tool_scope_note guides agent. top_canonical_heritage hoists the right items.
missing_data: Mie/Nara prefecture extension of Kii peninsula (Kumano routes also span Mie)
improvement_hint: For Kii peninsula queries, include Mie and Nara prefecture coverage too.
